research.description: Automated web search and synthesis to expand your knowledge boundaries

research.noTasksHint: Enter a topic and click 'Start Research'

aiModels.embedding.placeholder: Enter text to vectorize, e.g.: What are Rust's borrowing rules?

settings.aiManagement.description: Manage AI model endpoints and default Context templates
aiQuery.title: AI Document Query
aiQuery.description: Search documents, select multiple sources, and let AI perform cross-document integration, inference and computation
aiQuery.noDocuments: Matching documents will be listed by directory after querying
aiQuery.inputLabel: Enter query, integration, or computation request
aiQuery.inputPlaceholder: e.g.: Compare annual data across selected documents, calculate growth rates and explain differences.
aiQuery.queryFailed: AI document query failed. Please try again later.
aiQuery.noAnswer: Unable to generate a summary answer. Please refer to the retrieved passages.
aiQuery.noPreviewContent: This document has no previewable index content.
aiQuery.examples: Summarize the main conclusions of these documents and list supporting sources
aiQuery.example2: Identify requirements and implementation recommendations related to information security risk assessment
aiQuery.example3: Compare data, differences, and computable key metrics across selected documents
dashboard.overviewDescription: Real-time statistics on documents, queries, knowledge graph, team collaboration and system services
dashboard.health.title: System Health
dashboard.health.description: Real-time probes for database, Qdrant, document indexing queue and completed query latency; unprobed services are clearly marked
dashboard.health.noLatencyProbe: Active latency probing not configured for this service
dashboard.activity.title: Recent Activity
dashboard.activity.description: Aggregated from documents, queries, collaboration, issues, research and smart chat data
knowledge.title: Knowledge Center
knowledge.description: Document governance, FAQ, project deliverables, expert collaboration, discussion & ratings
knowledge.noExperts: No expert profiles yet. Create your expert profile.
knowledge.categoriesDescription: Create and maintain enterprise knowledge categories; categories in use are delete-protected
knowledge.categoryDeleteProtected: Category in use cannot be deleted
graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.description: Visualize relationships between documents and concepts
graph.canvasHint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Click a node for details
admin.noPermission: Your account does not have system administration permissions.
admin.passwordUnchanged: Leave blank to keep current password

admin.validationError: Please fill in all required fields; new password must be at least 8 characters
settings.system.title: System Parameters
settings.system.description: Manage models, API endpoints, and the contact info & links shown in the site footer
settings.system.restartRequiredDesc: Settings have been persisted to the database. Models and endpoints require a Cortex Backend restart to take effect.
settings.system.embeddingModelHelp: Model used for document indexing and query vectorization
settings.system.rerankingModelHelp: Model used for RAG result re-ranking
settings.system.pageindexModelHelp: LLM model used for PageIndex document structure analysis
settings.system.pageindexBaseUrlHelp: PageIndex calls the compatible LLM API at this endpoint
settings.system.apiKeyNote: For security, API Keys are not read, returned, or stored in plain text through this page. Set them via backend environment variables or a secrets manager.
settings.system.emailIntegrationDesc: Configure connection parameters for the project "Email Organization" feature, supporting IMAP/SMTP and Google Mail API.
settings.system.googleMailApiDesc: When enabled, the backend will use environment variables (e.g. GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID / GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) for OAuth2 authorization.
settings.system.bottomInfoBarDesc: Contact info is displayed at the bottom of every page. Empty fields will not show a link.
settings.system.contactNameHelp: e.g. IT Service Desk, MIS Duty Desk
settings.system.commonLinksDesc: Displayed in order in the footer menu. HTTP/HTTPS URLs only.
settings.system.enterpriseSystemsDesc: This list is shown on the dashboard for quick access to external subsystems. Systems are grouped by category and area.
settings.system.viewOnly: Your account has view-only access; only system administrators can make changes.
settings.system.saved: System parameters saved; footer info updated immediately, model settings apply after restart
workflow.overviewDescription: Track workflow definitions, publish status, pending tasks, and execution health
workflow.definitionsDescription: Manage drafts, versions, publishing, archiving, and test executions
workflow.tasksDescription: Handle manual tasks assigned to you: approve or reject
workflow.instancesDescription: View instances you started or participated in, with inputs, outputs, and step history
workflow.monitoringDescription: Central monitoring for queued, running, waiting, and failed workflows
workflow.published: Workflow passed structural validation and has been published
workflow.archived: Workflow archived; existing versions and execution history are preserved
workflow.inputMustBeObject: Input must be a JSON object
workflow.rejectComment: Please enter the reason for rejection
workflow.confirmArchive: Archive "{{name}}"? Execution history will be preserved.
workflow.noDefinitions: No workflows yet. Create one with the Designer.
workflow.monitoringDescription: Shows queued, running, waiting, and failed instances. Completed items can be found under "Instances".
workflow.runDescription: The JSON input becomes the workflow payload
workflow.designerDescription: Integrated eiva-fe-workflow: design versionable, executable workflows with nodes, connections, conditions, and swimlanes
workflow.testPayloadDescription: This JSON is sent when you click "Run" in the designer. The workflow must be saved and published first.
workflow.designerLoadError: Failed to load workflow and user data. Please verify the backend is up to date.

indexing.startGraphifyDesc: Run full semantic extraction (graphify extract) on the specified directory, including AST + LLM analysis
